name: DropdownExport
description: Export-settings panel adjacent to the main DropdownOptions. Two mutually-exclusive radio groups (scope: all/visible columns; format: CSV/Excel/PDF) plus a trailing Export Button. Defaults to all columns + CSV per the Figma spec.

props.name: scope
props.description: Currently selected scope. Default 'all' matches the Figma spec.

props.name: format
props.description: Currently selected format. Default 'csv' matches the Figma spec.

props.name: onScopeChange
props.description: Called when scope radio selection changes

props.name: onFormatChange
props.description: Called when format radio selection changes

props.name: onExport
props.description: Called when the user clicks the Export button. Receives the staged (scope, format) payload.

states.rationale: The dropdown panel itself is a passive floating surface. Interactive states live on the composed Radiobuttons (hybrid — checked uses OKLCH L-shift on neutral-base) and the outline Export Button (overlay). The selected ListItem rows paint --dls-color-intent-info-subtle via the ListItem selected contract.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to the next focusable element (Radiobutton inputs and the Export Button)
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
keyboard.ArrowUp / ArrowDown: Within a radio group, move selection to the previous/next radio (native <input type="radio"> behavior)
keyboard.Space: Select the focused radio / activate the Export Button

accessibility.focusManagement: Each row is a non-interactive ListItem (interactive=false) rendered as a <div> so the nested <input type="radio"> is the focusable child without button-in-button nesting. Radio groups are scoped by useId-generated name attributes (export-scope-{id} and export-format-{id}) so multiple instances on the same page don't collide. The Export Button is a native <button>.

propertyMapping.note: Two Radiobutton rows in a single name group. Default 'all' per Figma spec.
Three Radiobutton rows in a single name group. Default 'csv' per Figma spec.
Outline Button (variant="outline" intent="neutral" size="m"). Fires onExport(scope, format) with the staged selection.

useWhen: Below the Export item in the DropdownOptions menu on a table top bar
Any surface that triggers a table / dataset export with scope + format choices
doNotUseFor: Saving / downloading a single file → use a plain Button
Multi-step export wizards → use Dialog with a stepper

knownDeviations.description: Spec mentions --dls-color-component-dropdown-export-* tokens but they do not exist in tokens.json. CSS uses semantic surface/border tokens directly via the composed <List> building blocks.

The Figma 'state=pressed' info-subtle highlight on the default-selected rows ('All columns' + 'CSV') is driven in code by the ListItem selected={true} contract (paints --dls-color-intent-info-subtle). Visual match.
